channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattresses dumped, 13th June
item.description:
A number of dirty mattresses have been dumped in the parking area at the end of Melbury Drive

item.title: Overflowing bin, 13th June

Bin collection is due on Wednesday - this is how people have left the bin as at Saturday night!

item.title: Commercial premises wheelie bins., 13th June
item.description:
Rupert and Teddy premises leaving commercial wheelie bins on the pavement permanently instead of using their bin room. These bins are causing an obstruction on the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horseferry Place, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St John’s Road SE20 as of night of 11th June ALL, 13th June
item.description:
St John’s Road SE20 as of night of 11th June ALL street lights working at 19.30hrs ie when they should be off.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John's Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Builders material (rocks) fallen on road, 13th June
item.description:
There are rocks on the road along Pembridge Villas spanning 28 to 38 Pembridge Villas, with a strong concentration outside 32 Pembridge Villas. This material was dropped by builders. This is impacting the tyres of passing and parked cars. Also causing road degradation. Can you please remove the rocks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Pembridge Villas, Notting Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree missing, 13th June
item.description:
A tree or landing is missing or it just need to be paved.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cassland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Flypostering, 13th June
item.description:
Coop Deptford Bridge. Remove flypostering from by cash machine

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Snapped sign sharp stake left hidden in ground, 13th June
item.description:
Just to warn dog walkers and those who have young kids of this broken sharp metal stake left in ground near the arch bridge which is hidden by long grass around it. The main sign was snapped and left on the side, don't know for how long for.... My dog nearly ran into it and got inpaled. If you have young kids, or playful dogs, running or fell intp it, it could cause serious injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food delivery box dumped in the creek, 13th June
item.description:
Food delivery box dumped in the creek

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Rutland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 7 lime bikes dumped blocking the blind persons tactile dropped kerb at 226, Venner Rd, Penge at the jct with Newlands Park. Seen (time stamped photos) 17:55 Thu 11/6/26., 13th June
item.description:
7 lime bikes dumped blocking the blind persons tactile dropped kerb at 226, Venner Rd, Penge at the jct with Newlands Park. Seen (time stamped photos) 17:55 Thu 11/6/26. This is a frequent occurrence now, blocking the crossing for everyone including blind persons, forcing people including passengers at this busy Penge East Station location and school children to walk in the busy main road. Access to the single Sheffield bicycle stand is also blocked. Reported to Bromley Council and the three ward councillors. Stop dumping your hire bikes here! I have seen your van unloading Lime bikes at another London station blocking the footway. You are putting profit before public safety and using the public footway as a business premises.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass bottles left behind green box an broken glass on the path both sides, 13th June
item.description:
Broken glass on paths and bottles thrown behind green box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Rutland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
